assessmentSummary.adsenseRejectionLabel: Low value content / not meeting AdSense criteria
assessmentSummary.adsensePolicyMessage: We found some policy violations. Low value content. Your site does not yet meet the criteria of use in the Google publisher network.
mostLikelyRootCauses: Thin content - low word-count, minimal depth, heavy automation/reuse with no original analysis
Insufficient original voice, proprietary data, or lived-experience storytelling
Under-indexed or orphaned pages - low external linking, weak internal linking structure
Weak or missing trust/brand-signal pages: About, Privacy, Terms, Contact, Editorial Guidelines, by-line bios
Navigation and UX not optimized to signal a mature, trustworthy editorial tech-news brand
AI-only drafts with no human-edited improvements, citations, or original opinion
Missing visible authorship, update dates, and editorial workflow signals
assessmentSummary.competitivePositioning: High-quality signals exist in the schema (AI-driven threat-intel, content-gaps, gamification), but the surface-layer UX and content depth are not yet optimized to signal a mature, trustworthy news brand to Google AdSense reviewers.

finalStrategicRecommendations.brand: Position TheGridNexus as the roadmap-intelligence layer for tech, security, and gaming.
finalStrategicRecommendations.editorial: Enforce strict human editorial review and fact-check workflow before publish.
finalStrategicRecommendations.ux: Prioritize Live Wire ticker, Roadmap leaderboard, niche color coding, and gamification profiles.
finalStrategicRecommendations.seo: Use contentGaps for keyword-first planning and require focusKeyword + seoDescription before publish.
finalStrategicRecommendations.community: Publicize roadmapVotes and surface winning vote topics on the homepage.
finalStrategicRecommendations.monetization: Strengthen Nexus Brief newsletter and Nexus Reports before AdSense resubmission.
